docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VIBOONVORADEJ, SHAKRIS AS TO DEFENDANT MARC LI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARC LI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIBOONVORADEJ, SHAKRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARC LI $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HOWARD, CHERYLANN SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR HOWARD REED COMPANY, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $7,327.84 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MARC LI
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIBOONVORADEJ, SHAKRIS AS TO DEFENDANT MARC LI NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
